mapper.select: SELECT SUGGESTED_NO , ROLE_TYPE , KEYWORD , SEARCH_VOLUME FROM SUGGESTED_SEARCH ORDER BY SEARCH_VOLUME DESC
SELECT SUGGESTED_NO , ROLE_TYPE , KEYWORD , SEARCH_VOLUME FROM SUGGESTED_SEARCH WHERE KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' ORDER BY SEARCH_VOLUME DESC
mapper.insert: insert into search_log (search_no, role_type, keyword) values (SEQ_SEARCH_LOG.nextval, #{role_type}, #{query})
